title: Final acceptance recheck after blocker tasks

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Re-run the final acceptance decision after the two MVP-070 blocker tasks have completed.
goals: Run the full static/test suite including cargo fmt, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo test, and npm test --prefix clients.
Evaluate all MVP acceptance criteria again, with explicit pass/fail/partial evidence.
Do not claim GUI editor acceptance unless MVP-071 provides real editor evidence.
If a blocker remains due unavailable GUI tooling, document that the broker/source MVP works but end-to-end GUI acceptance requires manual user action.
non_goals: Do not implement fixes except tiny report corrections.
success_criteria: If fully accepted, state the MVP is working and cite evidence.
If not fully accepted, list remaining blockers and exact user/manual steps if needed.
